calendar.matters:
Motion To Release Temporary Restraining Order And Bond
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER PACIFIC PREMIER TRUST's Motion To Release Temporary Restraining Order And Bond.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner Pacific Premier Trust's motion to release temporary restraining order and bond, which is unopposed, is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. The $10,000.00 bond, numbered 602-135683-2, issued by United States Fire Insurance Company, is ordered EXONERATED, though the record does not demonstrate it's still in force. The Trust's request to "release" the bond nunc pro tunc back to either February 24, 2022, or March 28, 2022, which is unsupported by any authority, is DENIED. The bond was effective until ordered otherwise and back dating an order of exoneration is not appropriate as a general matter, and not supported on this record. The Trust's request to "release" the temporary restraining order nunc pro tunc back to either February 24, 2022, or March 28, 2022, is DENIED. The temporary restraining order expired by its terms on April 24, 2022. (See Klavdianos Dec., Ex. A.) The Trust provides no support for the notion that a court may "release" a TRO more than a year after its expiration, and make the order effective as of a date prior to the TRO's unambiguous expiration date. Even if such an order could be entered, the court does not find such an order supported by this record.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Release Temporary Restraining Order And Bond
Off Calendar May-11-2023 Off Calendar

PETITIONER PACIFIC PREMIER TRUST'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award

Order and Judgment signed.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)
